Welcome to the Election & Registration Office
The Office of Elections and Registration is accountable for the effective conduct of all elections and voter registration throughout the county. The staff complies with a broad spectrum of duties in assuring a smooth election process. Responsibilities include the processing and updating of registration records, finding polling places, instructing district boards for each election, preparing ballots, programming and maintenance of election machines, preparation of absentee ballots and certifying vote totals.

Our Services
Primary Election Day
Important information if you are a first time voter, where to locate you polling location and absentee/mail-in ballots on Election Day.
Election Day
Voting
Information for voting by absentee/mail-in ballots, in-person, military and overseas, disabled voting and voting as a college student.

Instructions for the Federal Postcad Application (FPCL) and Federal Write-in Absentee Ballot (FWAB).

On-line tool to locate your polling location (search by physical address) and sample ballot for your precinct.

Campaign export forms. pre-election candidate information, post-election candidate information and write-in tallying by election.
